other_findings.finding: Th cells are the CD4+ helper fraction; in Reynolds et al. (2021) the Tc17/Th17 disease-associated subset bridges cytotoxic and helper T cell programmes in psoriasis

In AD skin, CD4+ T cells including Th2 cells are the predominant T cell subset in the dermis; Th2 polarization drives IL-4 and IL-13 production which suppress antimicrobial peptides and barrier proteins

evidence_quotes.source_file: Reynolds et al. (2021) PDF full text

evidence_quotes.quote: CD4 T cells expressed helper and homing markers (CD4, IL7R, CCR7)
evidence_quotes.context: CD4 T helper cell markers in healthy skin
